_source: Tokyo Yamathon 2026 Registration Outlook and Weekly Plan to 1,100 Teams, 19 July 2026 (section 3, weekly operating plan)

thresholds._rule: Report section 6. Green: at or above cumulative target. Amber: below target by up to 10%, or one week under 90% of weekly plan. Red: more than 10% below target, or two weak weeks in a row. NOTE: the report defines amber as '5-10% below' and green as 'at or above target', leaving 0-5% below undefined; that gap is folded into amber here (conservative reading - a shortfall is never shown as green).

weeks.label: Open
weeks.note: Opening week - actual result, not a plan target. Report: 108 teams vs ~17 expected on the normalized 2025 curve.

channelMix2025._note: Planning split only. The live counts endpoint does not expose a general-vs-sponsor breakdown, so these are not tracked actuals. If the Wix counts function is extended to return `general` and `sponsor` fields, the dashboard will pick them up automatically.
